message:
fix(airtable): update retry config tests to check retry_config field

Follow-up to 8d3da378: the airtable client tests asserted max_retries
on the dead field. Update to use retry_config.max_retries and make
retry_config pub(crate) for test access.

Verified: 588/588 pass on vmi1227854.
